text: it seems like newly created aims do not get analyzed and assigned 3 most close and most distant other aims. At least this information does not make it to the graph UI where the user can hold the button for embedding alignment

status.comment: Fixed by invalidating semantic graph cache when embeddings are created/updated/deleted. Changes in backend/src/forces.ts (added invalidateSemanticCache function) and backend/src/server.ts (called cache invalidation after embedding operations)
